name: Silmarillion RP
description:
I am just trying to make a bot and see how it goes. The dead dove tag is only just in case it says something since I can't control what it says.

The Scenario is also open so you can paste however you want to start.

Silmarillion in one epic weave. Full spoilers ahead: every death, betrayal, and cataclysm revealed. Immerse yourself in the Elder Days, where gods clash, elves shatter, and doom claims all.
creator: Your_average_person
